requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619, IEC 62133, and IEC 62933-5-2 as Singapore Project and SCDF Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619、IEC 62133及IEC 62933-5-2作为新加坡项目和SCDF基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619、IEC 62133及IEC 62933-5-2作為新加坡項目和SCDF基準

summary.en: Singapore does not currently operate a mandatory pre-shipment product safety certification regime for stationary BESS equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or Saudi SABER/IEC 62619 route. However, Enterprise Singapore (formerly Spring Singapore) administers Singapore Standards (SS) that adopt IEC standards by reference; IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications), IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries), and IEC 62933-5-2 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems) are the internationally expected safety standards for lithium BESS in Singapore project specifications and SCDF ESS Technical Requirements. Project owners, EPCs, EMA connection agreements, and SCDF approval submissions for utility-scale, commercial, and industrial BESS projects in Singapore are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite for cell and module safety. Exporters should confirm the current Enterprise Singapore standard adoption status and SCDF ESS Technical Requirements directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 新加坡目前未针对固定式BESS实施强制性装运前产品安全认证制度，与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特SABER/IEC 62619路径相当。然而，企业发展局（前身为标新局）管理通过引用采纳IEC标准的新加坡标准（SS）；IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）、IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求——电化学系统）是新加坡项目规格和SCDF ESS技术要求中锂BESS的国际预期安全标准。新加坡公用事业规模、商业及工业BESS项目的项目业主、EPC承包商、EMA并网协议及SCDF审批提交，预计将以IEC 62619合规作为电芯和模组安全的技术前提。出口商在出货前应直接向企业发展局确认当前标准采纳状态及SCDF ESS技术要求。
summary.zht: 新加坡目前未針對固定式BESS實施強制性裝運前產品安全認證制度，與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特SABER/IEC 62619路徑相當。然而，企業發展局（前身為標新局）管理通過引用採納IEC標準的新加坡標準（SS）；IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）、IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求——電化學系統）是新加坡項目規格和SCDF ESS技術要求中鋰BESS的國際預期安全標準。新加坡公用事業規模、商業及工業BESS項目的項目業主、EPC承包商、EMA併網協議及SCDF審批提交，預計將以IEC 62619合規作為電芯和模組安全的技術前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向企業發展局確認當前標準採納狀態及SCDF ESS技術要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Singapore project specifications and SCDF submissions)
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (may be referenced for smaller BESS modules; verify applicability with project owner and SCDF)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected SCDF ESS Technical Requirements and project-specification reference)
Enterprise Singapore (SS) — administers Singapore Standards adopting IEC standards by reference (verify current SS adoption status at enterprisesg.gov.sg)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619, IEC 62133, or IEC 62933-5-2 in Singapore project specifications or SCDF ESS Technical Requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, and confirm whether SCDF ESS Technical Requirements reference IEC 62619 as a mandatory documentary prerequisite.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被新加坡项目规格或SCDF ESS技术要求接受为IEC 62619、IEC 62133或IEC 62933-5-2的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书，并确认SCDF ESS技术要求是否将IEC 62619列为强制文件前提。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被新加坡項目規格或SCDF ESS技術要求接受為IEC 62619、IEC 62133或IEC 62933-5-2的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書，並確認SCDF ESS技術要求是否將IEC 62619列為強制文件前提。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Singapore project owners, EMA, and SCDF ESS Technical Requirements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or SCDF submissions. Exporters should: (a) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Singapore BESS projects; (b) confirm whether SCDF ESS Technical Requirements mandate IEC 62619 as a documentary prerequisite for fire-safety approval — obtain the current SCDF ESS Technical Requirements from scdf.gov.sg before committing to a test programme; (c) check whether IEC 62133 applies to any module-level components in the specific system configuration; (d) prepare IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence where required by EMA or project-owner specifications; (e) confirm the applicable IEC standard editions referenced in the project specification or SCDF requirements before initiating testing.
gap.zh: 关键差距：新加坡项目业主、EMA及SCDF ESS技术要求将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或SCDF提交接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至新加坡BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（b）确认SCDF ESS技术要求是否将IEC 62619列为消防安全审批的强制文件前提——在启动测试计划前从scdf.gov.sg获取当前SCDF ESS技术要求；（c）确认IEC 62133是否适用于特定系统配置中的任何模组级部件；（d）在EMA或项目业主规格要求时准备IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据；（e）在启动测试前确认项目规格或SCDF要求中引用的适用IEC标准版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：新加坡項目業主、EMA及SCDF ESS技術要求將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或SCDF提交接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至新加坡BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（b）確認SCDF ESS技術要求是否將IEC 62619列為消防安全審批的強制文件前提——在啟動測試計畫前從scdf.gov.sg獲取當前SCDF ESS技術要求；（c）確認IEC 62133是否適用於特定系統配置中的任何模組級部件；（d）在EMA或項目業主規格要求時準備IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據；（e）在啟動測試前確認項目規格或SCDF要求中引用的適用IEC標準版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where EMA, SCDF, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; no confirmed standalone mandatory pre-shipment BESS product safety regulation as of dataset date — verify current SCDF ESS Technical Requirements and Enterprise Singapore standard adoption status directly
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Singapore project specifications, EMA connection agreements, and SCDF ESS Technical Requirements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Singapore project acceptance or SCDF approval. Obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and confirm current SCDF ESS Technical Requirements and Enterprise Singapore standard adoption status with SCDF and Enterprise Singapore before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619是新加坡项目规格、EMA并网协议和SCDF ESS技术要求中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足新加坡项目验收或SCDF审批要求。请从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书，并在出货前向SCDF和企业发展局确认现行SCDF ESS技术要求及企业发展局标准采纳状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619是新加坡項目規格、EMA併網協議和SCDF ESS技術要求中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足新加坡項目驗收或SCDF審批要求。請從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書，並在出貨前向SCDF和企業發展局確認現行SCDF ESS技術要求及企業發展局標準採納狀態。
